info.name: SWD392_BE API
info.description: API collection for SWD392 Backend Application

request.description: Authenticate user with email and password credentials. Returns JWT token and user information.
Register a new user with email and password credentials. Role can be: STUDENT, LECTURE, ADMIN.
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information. Requires valid JWT token. Roles: STUDENT, LECTURE, ADMIN.

response.name: Get Current User Success
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "User information retrieved successfully",
    "data": {
        "userId": 1,
        "fullName": "John Doe",
        "email": "user@example.com",
        "role": "STUDENT",
        "status": "ACTIVE",
        "provider": "local",
        "avatarUrl": null,
        "createdAt": "2026-01-23T10:30:00"
    }
}

request.description: Redirects to Google for OAuth2 authentication. Users will be redirected to Google login page (HTTP 302).
Change the authenticated user's password. Requires valid JWT token.
Request a password reset email. Sends a reset token to the provided email address.
Reset password using the token received via email from the forgot-password endpoint.

formdata.value: This is the content body of the article.

formdata.description: Diagram files to upload (optional, multiple allowed)

request.description: Create a new article with optional diagram file uploads. Roles: STUDENT, LECTURE. Content-Type: multipart/form-data.

response.name: Create Article Success
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Article created successfully",
    "data": {
        "articleId": 1,
        "title": "My Article Title",
        "contentBody": "This is the content body of the article.",
        "status": "PENDING",
        "topicId": 1,
        "topicName": "Topic Name",
        "author": {
            "userId": 1,
            "name": "John Doe",
            "email": "user@example.com",
            "avatarUrl": null
        },
        "approvedBy": null,
        "diagrams": [],
        "createdAt": "2026-02-27T10:30:00",
        "approvedAt": null
    },
    "requestId": "abc-123",
    "timestamp": "2026-02-27T10:30:00"
}

request.description: Retrieve a specific article by its ID.

response.name: Get Article Success

query.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: desc)

request.description: Retrieve all articles with pagination and search. Supports keyword search, sorting, and pagination.

response.name: Get All Articles Success
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Articles retrieved successfully",
    "data": {
        "totalItems": 1,
        "totalPages": 1,
        "currentPage": 0,
        "pageSize": 10,
        "data": [
            {
                "articleId": 1,
                "title": "My Article Title",
                "contentBody": "This is the content body.",
                "status": "APPROVED",
                "topicId": 1,
                "topicName": "Topic Name",
                "author": {
                    "userId": 1,
                    "name": "John Doe",
                    "email": "user@example.com",
                    "avatarUrl": null

            }
        ]
    },

    "timestamp": "2026-02-27T10:30:00"
}
